_basedOn: docs/PLAYBOOK.md — keep this config aligned to the playbook.
positioning: The shift logger built by a support worker.

brand.voice: Warm, plain-spoken, practical. A Central Coast NDIS-world insider with 6+ years on the job who built a tool to fix a real pain. Never salesy, never corporate. Australian spelling.
brand.founderStory: I work in disability support and got sick of the admin eating the hours that should go to participants. So I built a tool to fix it. Sharing what I learn along the way.
brand.disclosure: I built this app — when I mention it I'll always say so. Posts are from me, not a bot.

audience.primary: NDIS sole traders / frontline support workers in Australia (≈70% women, casualised, mobile-first)
audience.secondary: Small and medium NDIS providers, support coordinators and plan managers (the buyer tier)
pains: Writing shift notes from memory hours after the shift
Admin and paperwork eating support hours
Confusing NDIS price guide and line-item changes
Invoicing, claims and getting paid on time
audience.tone_notes: Wary of being sold to and protective of participants. Lead with usefulness. Respect, never hype.

app.name: Caira
app.tagline: Care is the work. Caira handles the record.
app.oneLiner: Caira takes the documentation off a support worker's plate — notes, records and reporting handled, so the time goes back to care.
app.status: pre-launch — site not live yet; legal/go-to-market in progress
app.earlyInterest: Join the early list / grab the free guides
app.waitlistSetup: See waitlist/SETUP.md — hosted form + ESP (MailerLite), auto-delivers magnet + runs the 5-email nurture.
app.mentionPolicy: Soft. App appears as 'the tool I built' only after value is established. Earn the right to mention it (~50 helpful comments before pitching in any community). Max ~1 in 4 posts references it in weeks 1-2.

channels._priority: Facebook (communities) -> founder LinkedIn -> Instagram -> TikTok. This engine schedules the Facebook Page; LinkedIn/community engagement stays human.

linkedin.note: Post manually from your PERSONAL profile (5-7x reach), 3-5x/week, links in first comment. Build-in-public home. Not automated here.

communities.note: Join and be helpful (real name, support worker who built a tool). Earn trust before any mention.
groups: NDIS Support Coordinators (CoS) & Plan Managers groups
Regional NSW groups (e.g. NDIS Northern NSW)
r/NDIS (participate as a person, not a brand)

arc.week1: Pure value + introduce yourself. Zero app pitch. Build trust and show you live in this world.
arc.week2: More value, first founder-story posts, one gentle pre-launch invite to shape Caira.
arc.ongoing: 70% useful content, 20% community/conversation, 10% honest app updates + case studies.

compliance._basedOn: PLAYBOOK.md §Australia/NDIS compliance. ACCC/NDIA/NDIS Commission penalise misleading NDIS advertising.
rules: Never imply NDIS/NDIA approval, endorsement or affiliation.
Never overstate outcomes or guarantee compliance — Caira HELPS workers write their own compliant notes.
Treat participant data as sensitive information under the Privacy Act 1988; lead on privacy as a trust differentiator.
